enabled_log.description: Defines log configurations including category, group, and retention policy
enabled_log.type: list(object({category: optional(string),category_group: optional(string),retention_policy: list(object({days: optional(number),enabled: bool}))}))

eventhub_authorization_rule_id.description: Specifies the ID for the Event Hub authorization rule

eventhub_name.description: Defines the name of the Event Hub for logging or metrics

log.description: Specifies log settings including category, group, and retention details
log.type: list(object({category: optional(string),category_group: optional(string),enabled: optional(bool),retention_policy: list(object({days: optional(number),enabled: bool}))}))

log_analytics_destination_type.description: Specifies the destination type for Log Analytics (e.g., AzureMonitor)

log_analytics_workspace_id.description: ID of the Log Analytics workspace for metrics and logs

metric.description: Configures metrics with category, enable status, and retention settings
metric.type: list(object({category: string,enabled: optional(bool),retention_policy: list(object({days: optional(number),enabled: bool}))}))

name.description: Defines the name of the resource (required and unique)

partner_solution_id.description: Specifies the partner solution ID, if applicable

storage_account_id.description: ID of the storage account for log or metric storage

target_resource_id.description: Specifies the ID of the target resource to configure

timeouts.description: Defines operation timeouts for create, read, update, and delete actions
